payees.title: Payees
payees.subtitle: Master list of merchants you transact with

columns.name: Name
columns.categoryHint: Effective category for this payee. Shows the default if you've set one — otherwise the category most frequently used in past transactions. Auto-filled when creating a new transaction.

emptyState.title: No payees yet
emptyState.description: Connect a bank to detect payees automatically, or create one manually.

enforce.label: Always use payee category
enforce.hint: Payee's default category is always used. AI categorization is skipped for this payee.

hint.label: Use as a hint
hint.hint: Sets the payee's default category, but AI can still override it based on the transaction details.

off.label: Off
off.hint: Payee's default category is ignored. Categorization is handled by AI or your other rules.

detail.aliasesEmpty: No aliases yet. New variants will appear here when this Payee matches another merchant name.
detail.cannotDeleteCanonicalAlias: Cannot delete the alias matching the Payee's name. Rename the Payee instead.
detail.addAliasDescription: Future transactions whose merchant text normalizes to this alias will automatically link to this Payee. Past transactions are unchanged.
detail.aliasDuplicate: This alias is already attached to this Payee.
detail.aliasUsedByOtherPayee: This alias is already used by "{name}".
detail.deletePayeeDescription: Linked transactions keep their category but lose the payee link. This cannot be undone.
detail.deleteAndIgnoreTitle: Delete this Payee and ignore future matches?
detail.deleteAndIgnoreDescription: Deletes this Payee AND adds its names (canonical + all aliases) to the ignored-names blocklist. Future syncs won't recreate it from raw merchant text. Linked transactions stay but lose their payee link.
detail.mergeDescription: Pick the target payee. All transactions and aliases move to the target; this payee is deleted.
detail.topCategoryHint: The category most frequently used in transactions linked to this payee. Used as a fallback when no default category is set.
detail.defaultTagsHint: These tags are automatically added to new transactions linked to this payee (bank syncs and imports).

transactionsDialog.title: {name} — transactions
transactionsDialog.empty: No transactions linked to this payee.

toasts.deletedAndIgnored: Payee deleted and added to ignored-names list

errors.collision: A payee with this name already exists. Merge instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again.

settings.title: Payee detection settings
settings.description: Control how the app auto-detects Payees from your synced transactions.

payeeFromDescription.label: Detect payees from transaction descriptions
payeeFromDescription.description: When your bank doesn't provide a dedicated merchant field, fall back to the transaction description (note) to auto-detect Payees. Useful for bank connections that have merchant fields empty or absent. May produce noisier Payee names (e.g. installment-payment prefixes) which you can rename or merge afterwards.

bulkCategorizationMode.label: Apply categorization mode to all payees
bulkCategorizationMode.description: Choose how the categorization should behave for every existing payee. This overrides each payee's individual setting.
bulkCategorizationMode.confirmDescription: All payees will be switched to {mode}. You can still change each payee individually later.
bulkCategorizationMode.errorNotification: Failed to update payees. Please try again.

ignoredNames.title: Ignored merchant names
ignoredNames.description: Raw merchant strings that should never automatically create a Payee. Useful for noise like 'Card transfer', 'From: <name>', or refund prefixes. You can still link these names to a Payee manually — only automatic matching is blocked.
ignoredNames.addError: Failed to add to ignored names
ignoredNames.conflictDescription: A Payee with the same normalized name as "{name}" already exists. Continuing will delete that Payee (transactions stay, lose link).
